'''Fecklen''' were stumpy,<ref name="CSWE" /> squat, horned,<ref name="Strongholds" /> gracile-necked creatures that lived in herds on their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]].<ref name="CSWE" /> They were the primary ranching animal on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] and were raised for their meat and [[Milk/Legends|milk]]. Though quite peaceful, they were known to block traffic and were capable of producing a loud booming noise that served to frighten off predators and locate other members of their herd. Fecklens roamed widely and grazed on [[Balmgrass/Legends|balmgrass]].<ref name="Strongholds" />

In [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth]]'' to [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]].</ref> while [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[General/Legends|general]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] met with the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Kyp Durron]] and [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]], a herd of fecklen near the shore of Chandrila's [[Silver Sea/Legends|Silver Sea]] began to angrily make booming and whirring noises at a nearby group of [[Squall (species)|squalls]],<ref name="NJOEVIIIR">''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth]]''</ref> members of a small [[Limb/Legends|quadrupedal]] [[Species/Legends|species]] also native to Chandrila.<ref name="DomesticatedSquall">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20030306squall|series=Creature Feature|text=Domesticated Squall}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The fecklen first appeared in [[Greg Keyes]]'s [[2001]] novel ''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth]]'', the second volume of the ''[[Edge of Victory Duology]]'', which itself was part of the series ''[[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order]]''.<ref name="NJOEVIIIR" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth]]'' {{1st}}
